title: The Quiet at Fenwick House
description: When Eleanor inherits her estranged aunt's house on the marsh, she finds it spotless, candle-lit, and waiting — as though her aunt had only stepped out. The aunt has been dead three months. The man who keeps the house, courteous and cold-handed, has kept it far longer than that. A gentle, sorrowful ghost story about the love that outlasts a death, and the danger of a house that will not let go.
